title: Hyphen protocol v0 transfer.manifest payload
description: Validates envelope.payload when type=transfer.manifest (docs/protocol/hyphen-protocol-v0.md §7.3). The manifest is sent before chunks and carries only metadata needed to allocate, display, resume, and verify a local transfer.

fileId.description: Opaque sender-generated transfer id, stable across resume attempts.

filename.description: Display filename only; receivers choose the destination path.

mimeType.description: Lowercase normalized media type; use application/octet-stream if unknown.

chunkSizeBytes.description: Effective chunk size after capability negotiation; capped to fit base64 data in a 4 MiB frame.

chunkCount.description: Number of transfer.chunk payloads expected. Empty files use 0.
